current_active_queue.label: Continuous Execution Readiness And Rollout
current_active_queue.why_now: The owner explicitly asked for continuous autonomous execution. Fresh 2026-07-05 target-run evidence and a refreshed 2026-07-05 functional-effectiveness proof return the selector to `defer_ltp_and_refresh_evidence`, so `Continuous-Execution` remains the active bounded loop for evidence-and-gate upkeep while heavy LTP work stays deferred.

certified_baseline.label: Complete Hybrid Final-State Realization
certified_baseline.claim_boundary: Certified closure remains historical proof of capability closure. It does not override current stale, degraded, or recovered live posture.

current_live_posture.summary: Fresh 2026-07-05 upkeep evidence now shows both Codex target runs and the Claude workload probe at native_attach/ready while the selector again defers heavy LTP work. Keep stronger live-host claims tied to fresh evidence, and keep separate non-blocking host snapshot config attention from this recovered live target-run posture.
